markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Neporent / Perapekhina wins the Neporent / Perapekhina vs Ezzat / Mariani professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Monastir Final after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Neporent / Perapekhina vs Ezzat / Mariani professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Monastir Final after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If any player on either team does not participate in the match, even if a replacement plays and the match still takes place with some of the original players/teams, the event is considered a different match and all markets will be settled at $0.50. If a player/team withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that team will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Neporent / Perapekhina win the Neporent / Perapekhina vs Ezzat / Mariani: W15 Monastir Final match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Ezzat / Mariani wins the Neporent / Perapekhina vs Ezzat / Mariani professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Monastir Final after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Neporent / Perapekhina vs Ezzat / Mariani professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Monastir Final after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If any player on either team does not participate in the match, even if a replacement plays and the match still takes place with some of the original players/teams, the event is considered a different match and all markets will be settled at $0.50. If a player/team withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that team will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Ezzat / Mariani win the Neporent / Perapekhina vs Ezzat / Mariani: W15 Monastir Final match?
